name: LogglyConnector
description: Connects to SolarWinds Loggly (log management). Searches logs and field stats, manages saved searches / alerts / dashboards / source groups / users, and pushes events via the bulk-send endpoint. Management API uses HTTP Basic; bulk send uses a URL-embedded customer token.

install_fields.label: Loggly Subdomain
install_fields.help: Your Loggly account subdomain (the prefix in https://{subdomain}.loggly.com). Used to derive the Management API base URL.

install_fields.label: Loggly Username
install_fields.help: Loggly account username (or API-credential username) used as the Basic-auth principal for the Management API.

install_fields.label: Loggly Password
install_fields.help: Loggly account password (or API-credential secret). Sent only as part of HTTP Basic auth — never logged.

install_fields.label: Customer Token (Bulk Send)
install_fields.help: Loggly customer token (UUID) used in the bulk-send URL path. Required only if this connector pushes events via send_events_bulk.

install_fields.label: Management API Base URL Override
install_fields.help: Override the derived Management API base URL. Leave blank to use https://{subdomain}.loggly.com/apiv2.

install_fields.label: Bulk Ingest Base URL
install_fields.help: Bulk-ingest base URL. Default is the global ingest host; override only for testing or a private collector.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Loggly Management API requests per minute. Default is 60.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates subdomain + username + password and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Loggly Management API connectivity by running a 1-row search.

apis.name: Search Logs
apis.description: GET /apiv2/search — search logs by query, time window, page size, and order.

apis.name: Field Stats
apis.description: GET /apiv2/fields/{field} — facet aggregation for a single field over a time window.
